summary: Comprehensive testing of new Stock Control feature completed successfully. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI flows functional with proper integration between React frontend and FastAPI backend. Stock management system fully operational.
passed_tests: Get Stock Item Details API - GET /api/stock/items/{id}
Create Stock Movement Entry API - POST /api/stock/movements
Create Stock Movement Exit API - POST /api/stock/movements
Filter Low Stock Items API - GET /api/stock/items?low_stock_only=true
Dashboard Low Stock Count API - GET /api/dashboard
Frontend Add New Stock Item Flow

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All stock UI flows and components working)
